Noah Sharrow

Person · First seen 3307-09-14 · 3 mentions
Active: 3307-09-14 → 3307-09-20
Mentions Timeline (3 articles)
3307-09-20
Thargoids Vanish from Cornsar System
Thargoid vessels attacking Cornsar unexpectedly withdraw after four days of combat, leaving behind damaged starports and crashed alien vessels.
3307-09-16
Thargoid Strike Follows Salvation’s Prediction
Thargoid forces attack the Cornsar system, validating Salvation's prediction. Over ten thousand casualties result from direct assaults on Chadwick Port and Ito Market stations.
3307-09-14
Salvation Warns of Thargoid Strike
The anonymous figure Salvation claims Thargoid forces will attack the Cornsar system, but Aegis dismisses the warning due to lack of evidence.
